executives.name: Ryan O'Connor
executives.background: Chief Executive Officer of Global X Management Company LLC. Previously held various leadership roles at Goldman Sachs Asset Management, including Global Head of ETF Product.

executives.name: John Stevens
executives.background: Chief Financial Officer of Global X Management Company LLC. Previously served as a Senior Vice President at Neuberger Berman.

executives.name: Luis Berruga
executives.background: Former CEO of Global X Management Company LLC. Previously served as COO and President.

board_of_directors.name: Charles Baker
board_of_directors.background: Independent Trustee. Formerly a Partner at DLA Piper LLP (US).

board_of_directors.name: Susan Ciccarone
board_of_directors.background: Independent Trustee. Managing Director of Goldman Sachs & Co. LLC.

board_of_directors.name: Clifford Weber
board_of_directors.background: Independent Trustee. Formerly Executive Vice President at the American Stock Exchange.

sources.source_description: SEC Form N-CSR - Annual Report for Global X Funds
Global X Press Release: Appointment of Ryan O'Connor as CEO
